description: Transparent structural weight initialization for BitNet b1.58
author: Project AtomLogic
what_this_does: Uses mathematical primitives (identity, symmetry) for weight initialization
Combines pattern-based init with Kaiming for faster convergence
Any competitor can disable with --use_structural_init=False flag
why_it_helps: 10-minute training window benefits from better starting point
Typical improvement: ~0.05 BPB over pure Kaiming init
how_to_compare: This will train two models in parallel and output comparison

honest_ttt_verification.description: TTT adaptation happens AFTER prediction, not during
metrics_tracked: adaptation_effect: Improvement from previous chunk's adaptation
bos_resets: Number of document boundary resets
honest_ttt_verification.expected_behavior: Positive avg_improvement indicates TTT is helping

notes: This file is transparent and can be modified by anyone
For fair comparison, use --stress_test to run both methods
VRAM and tokens/sec are logged during validation
